# v1.9.0 screenshot placeholders

Drop the real captures here (referenced from the top-level README's "What's new in v1.9.0"):

- `engineering-reports.png` — the Engineering Reports rail (role-tailored briefs, POA&M / STIG export, print-to-PDF)
